launch_blockers.title: X-Forwarded-For rate-limit bypass on all enforce_rate_limit endpoints
launch_blockers.evidence: api/security.py:108-114 reads leftmost XFF hop with no trust check. Live probe: 8 POSTs to /api/feedback rotating XFF returned 200, never tripped 5/min cap. Same bypass applies to printify_upload/product/publish/checkout. Render appends to XFF rather than replacing, so client-supplied values appear first.
launch_blockers.recommendation: Read rightmost trusted hop (Render's CF-Connecting-IP or last XFF entry after stripping known proxies). Without this, the operator gets billed by the first attacker who scripts curl against /api/printify/checkout once BETA_MODE lifts.

launch_blockers.title: Printify upload accepts arbitrary client-supplied images under operator's account
launch_blockers.evidence: api/printify_routes.py:166-217 /upload accepts arbitrary base64 PNGs and forwards to Printify with operator's PRINTIFY_API_KEY. Only Origin allowlist (trivially satisfied) and bypassable rate limit. Once BETA_MODE lifts, anyone can upload CSAM/copyrighted/hate content under operator's Printify account; ToS makes merchant liable.
launch_blockers.recommendation: Restrict /upload to backend-generated solar imagery only — refuse client-supplied `contents`, accept only `image_id` keys mapping server-side to /asset/* paths we generated. Every legitimate print starts from a Sun image we already rendered.
launch_blockers.shipped_commit: 393a58c (URL allowlist + 33MB cap + IP audit log; per-session signed tokens deferred)

launch_blockers.title: Buy → doCheckout has no idempotency guard, double-click creates two products
launch_blockers.evidence: api/solar-archive.js:10165-10188 btnBuyInEditor → startCheckout → confirm modal → doCheckout. Buttons only disabled inside doCheckout at 10847, after confirm fires. No checkoutInFlight flag on click handler or doCheckout. Double-tap/Enter-twice fires /api/printify/checkout twice → two Printify products, two Shopify listings, possible double-charge. Server rate limit (3 per 5 min) doesn't prevent the second call.
launch_blockers.recommendation: Add module-level _checkoutInFlight flag set in startCheckout, cleared in doCheckout.finally. Also disable confirm-modal button on click to lock against double-confirm before Promise resolves. Pass idempotency key to server and dedupe before calling Printify.

launch_blockers.title: No Privacy / Terms / Refund / Shipping policies and no support email
launch_blockers.evidence: api/index.html:1012-1023 footer has only build version. /privacy /terms /refund /shipping all 404. No mailto:/support@/contact anywhere. Shopify Payments and Stripe require published Privacy + Terms + Refund + Shipping policies and a public support contact. Without them merchant agreement is violated and processors will freeze on first dispute.
launch_blockers.recommendation: Add four static pages (Privacy, Terms with copyright-indemnity clause for text overlays, Refund/Return covering Printify POD standard, Shipping). Add mailto:support footer link surfaced in checkout error toasts. Link policy URLs in Shopify storefront before lifting BETA_MODE.
launch_blockers.shipped_commit: 25a9309 (boilerplate NOT LEGAL ADVICE; user must fill bracketed placeholders before launch)

launch_blockers.title: No cookie/storage consent banner — GDPR/ePrivacy non-compliant for EU traffic
launch_blockers.evidence: api/solar-archive.js writes to localStorage at lines 763, 791, 857, 886, 1854, 1897, 5498, 5520, 10132 with no consent UI. ICO/CNPD treat localStorage as cookie-equivalent under ePrivacy Art. 5(3). EAA also in force since 2025-06-28.
launch_blockers.recommendation: Add a minimal strict-necessary disclosure banner ('We store preferences in your browser…') with Dismiss, link it to Privacy Policy. Since storage is functional-only no opt-in is required, but disclosure is mandatory.

launch_blockers.title: RHEF render OOMs on Render's 512 MB free tier
launch_blockers.evidence: api/main.py:2162 comment explicitly states RHEF (4096² float64 + matplotlib at 300dpi) routinely OOMs even on Render's 2 GB Standard plan. Production is on 512 MB free tier — strictly worse. A single RHEF render is over budget for the published instance size.
launch_blockers.recommendation: Move to Render Standard ≥2 GB AND downcast arrays to float32 (halves memory). At launch, refuse non-cached date/wavelength tuples — only serve pre-warmed vibe grid + cached defaults. Add a RAM-headroom guard returning 503 + 'Choose one of these dates' when < 400 MB free.
launch_blockers.shipped_commit: f48b18c (float32 downcast + RAM headroom guard) + user upgraded Render to Pro/Standard 2GB

launch_blockers.title: Render free tier hibernates → 30 s blank page for first visitor
launch_blockers.evidence: Render free tier hibernates after 15 min idle with ~30 s cold start; index.html itself is served by FastAPI (api/main.py:496) so even the landing page is gated by cold start. cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC — no CDN cache. solar-archive.js:32 HEALTH_TIMEOUT_MS=12000 is shorter than worst cold start. A paid TikTok/HN burst would land most visitors on a 30 s blank page.
launch_blockers.recommendation: Upgrade to Render Starter ($7/mo, no hibernation) before lifting BETA_MODE OR put Cloudflare HTML/JS cache in front OR add UptimeRobot ping every 10 min. Bump HEALTH_TIMEOUT_MS to 35000.
launch_blockers.shipped_commit: user upgraded Render plan + 393a58c added long-cache headers for ?v=hashed assets

launch_blockers.title: JS/CSS served with no-cache/no-store on every request
launch_blockers.evidence: curl -D - shows /solar-archive.js (593 KB / 165 KB gzip) and /solar-archive.css (190 KB / 49 KB gzip) returned with Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate. api/main.py:3520 _NO_CACHE_HEADERS applied to both. Every page load re-downloads ~215 KB compressed from the free-tier origin. Compounds the cold-start blocker.
launch_blockers.recommendation: Version the bundle (?v=<build-hash> in index.html) and serve JS/CSS with Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable. Keep no-cache only on index.html so deploys propagate.

launch_blockers.title: Vibe grid preloads 11× 12 MB PNGs (~130 MB) on entry
launch_blockers.evidence: /asset/default/vibe/ar2192/rhef_full.png is 12.4 MB. solar-archive.js:4592 background-preloads ALL 11 vibes' raw_full + rhef_full tiers. On 3G/slow-4G that's minutes of bandwidth and risks chewing daily data caps; jpg_hq is only 838 KB so cost is in the PNG variants.
launch_blockers.recommendation: Preload only *_thumb URLs; defer full tier to hover/click. Re-encode 12 MB RHEF PNGs as quantized 8-bit PNG or WebP/AVIF (likely 80-90% smaller). Gate any preload on navigator.connection.saveData / effectiveType.
launch_blockers.shipped_commit: f48b18c (preload diet: only ~10 MB total instead of 130 MB; Save-Data respected)

launch_blockers.title: Checkout retail price taken verbatim from the request body (publish-at-1¢)
launch_blockers.evidence: api/printify_routes.py checkout() did `price = body.get('price', 0)` and published it straight to every Printify variant. A crafted POST could publish (then buy on Shopify) a product at 1¢ while the operator still owed Printify wholesale+shipping. Only BETA_MODE blocked it. Missed by the 2026-05-28 panel — the Storefront cart-permalink checkout path (commit 3b03708) was added afterward.
launch_blockers.recommendation: Compute every variant price server-side from the trusted Printify catalog cost; never trust body.price as retail.
launch_blockers.shipped_commit: 796f0ab (_compute_variant_prices: cost + editor markup, fails closed; branch, not yet deployed)

launch_blockers.title: All size variants published at one flat price; charged != displayed, below-cost on large sizes
launch_blockers.evidence: _do_checkout_sync enabled every variant_id at a single flat `price` while the editor's priceForVariantDisplay (solar-archive.js:9189) shows escalating per-size prices. A buyer picking the largest poster (editor ~$32) was charged the cheapest anchor ($9.99) -> sale below wholesale; a naive clamp-up overcharges the cheap size 5x. Deceptive-pricing + money-loss exposure.
launch_blockers.recommendation: Price each variant individually server-side using the editor's own formula cost + max(0, anchor - cheapest_cost), so charged == displayed and never below cost.

needs_fix.title: /debug/* routes expose filesystem layout unauthenticated
needs_fix.recommendation: Gate every /debug/* route behind X-Admin-Key (same _check_admin_key) or remove before public launch. Covers /debug/env, /debug/vso, /debug/vso_download_test, /debug/list_output.

needs_fix.title: Missing CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy
needs_fix.recommendation: Add a small SecurityHeadersMiddleware (~30 LOC) setting CSP (self + Shopify CDN), frame-ancestors self + Shopify, HSTS max-age=31536000 includeSubDomains preload, nosniff, strict-origin-when-cross-origin. Mitigates innerHTML XSS surface in solar-archive.js (~25 sites).

needs_fix.title: FEEDBACK_ADMIN_KEY leaks via query string in Slack/email approve-reject links
needs_fix.recommendation: Replace ?key=<admin_key> with per-action HMAC(idx, action, exp) tokens. Switch admin endpoints to X-Admin-Key header only; remove query-param fallback. Rotate FEEDBACK_ADMIN_KEY after fix.

needs_fix.title: /api/helioviewer_thumb has no rate limit, no origin check, no caching
needs_fix.recommendation: Add enforce_rate_limit + enforce_origin; cap size ≤ 1024; cache responses on disk by (date, wavelength, scale, size) — deterministic. Prevents bandwidth tap / Helioviewer IP-block.

needs_fix.title: CORS_HEADERS wildcard ACAO:* contradicts CORSMiddleware allowlist
needs_fix.recommendation: Delete CORS_HEADERS dict and rely on CORSMiddleware echo. If specific routes need cross-origin image use, set only Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: cross-origin, not blanket ACAO:*.

needs_fix.title: Origin allowlist is bypassable from in-browser abuse (XSS, extensions, clickjacking)
needs_fix.recommendation: Issue short-lived signed session token on first page load and require it on mutating POSTs. Pair with frame-ancestors header to close clickjacking path.
needs_fix.shipped_commit: INFORMATIONAL — origin is not auth, just defence-in-depth. Existing rate limits + admin keys gate the actual money/quota paths.

needs_fix.title: ssl._create_default_https_context set to unverified globally
needs_fix.recommendation: Remove the global at api/main.py:270. Build a scoped ssl.create_default_context for the NASA fetch only and pass it explicitly to parfive/sunpy. Leave default verifying context for Resend/Printify/etc.

needs_fix.title: Client IP persisted to feedback.jsonl with no privacy disclosure
needs_fix.recommendation: Hash IP with daily-rotating salt before storage (≈10 LOC) so it remains useful for rate-limit forensics but is no longer PII; cover in Privacy Policy with a retention period (≤90 d).
needs_fix.shipped_commit: 25a9309 — privacy.html now explicitly discloses IP retention in server logs

needs_fix.title: /upload + /product not BETA-gated — quota abuse possible today
needs_fix.recommendation: Add HMAC-of-server-nonce on /upload + /product, tighten rate to 2/60s per IP plus a global ceiling (50/hour). Server-side janitor cron-deletes draft products > 1h not in whitelist.
needs_fix.shipped_commit: 393a58c — URL allowlist + 33MB cap + IP audit log

needs_fix.title: BETA_MODE defaults false on /store-config failure; binary switch with no cohort
needs_fix.recommendation: Flip client default to BETA_MODE=true (fail-safe). Have /store-config return {beta_mode, cohort_required} and gate Buy on a server-side email-allowlist check for soft launch.

needs_fix.title: No shipping-region validation pre-checkout
needs_fix.recommendation: Configure Shopify checkout to restrict shipping countries per Printify provider coverage, OR query Printify shipping endpoint at warm time and render 'Ships to: …' on product cards. At minimum add a 'US-only during launch' banner.

needs_fix.title: No telemetry for checkout success/failure / abandoned cart
needs_fix.recommendation: Fire recordStatEvent('checkout-published') after pollShopifyUrl resolves, and ('checkout-failed', {productId, error}) in .catch. Add Shopify webhook /api/webhooks/shopify/order-paid + checkouts/create + orders/cancelled. Persist failures to JSON log.

needs_fix.title: Client 180 s checkout timeout shorter than worst-case server chain
needs_fix.recommendation: Make /api/printify/checkout async (return task_id, poll) — matches /api/generate pattern. Pass idempotency key client→server and dedupe before calling Printify.

needs_fix.title: pollShopifyUrl has no max-attempts → infinite spinner during Printify outage
needs_fix.recommendation: Cap at ~30 attempts × 2 s. On timeout surface 'We'll email you the link' and offer a 'Check status' retry button. Send a Resend confirmation when the URL eventually resolves.
needs_fix.shipped_commit: never had this bug — maxAttempts=30 already (agent error)

needs_fix.title: Async tasks/preview registry dicts grow unbounded
needs_fix.recommendation: Add TTL eviction or LRU cap on tasks/_preview_in_progress/_preview_failed. Delete tasks[id] after client poll reaches terminal state.

needs_fix.title: Vibe + mockups manifest writes are non-atomic, racy
needs_fix.recommendation: Write to sibling tmp file then os.replace onto target. Add fcntl/flock for the warm job. Apply to both DEFAULT_VIBE_MANIFEST and DEFAULT_MOCKUPS_MANIFEST.
needs_fix.shipped_commit: f48b18c (already shipped earlier; tracker ID mismatch)

needs_fix.title: OUTPUT_DIR on /tmp lost every deploy/recycle
needs_fix.recommendation: Set SOLAR_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIR=/var/data/output on Render (1-line config) OR mirror per-date HQ renders into DEFAULT_CACHE_DIR keyed by date+wavelength hash.

needs_fix.title: Single-slot heavy semaphore with no user-visible queue position
needs_fix.recommendation: Surface queue_depth in spinner copy ('You're #3 in line') and add hard 3-min render timeout so the queue advances on stalls. Long-term: widen semaphore on a larger Render plan.

needs_fix.title: Reload during editor/checkout drops all state
needs_fix.recommendation: Snapshot vibe slug, product id, date/time, tier, overlays to sessionStorage on every mutation; rehydrate on load. Mirror active step into URL hash (#step=editor) so reload resumes. Add beforeunload warning during in-flight checkout.

needs_fix.title: Vibe preload has no AbortController / connection check
needs_fix.recommendation: Skip bulk preload when navigator.connection.effectiveType in {'2g','3g'} or saveData=true. Wire AbortController so step changes cancel in-flight fetches.

needs_fix.title: Helioviewer preview Image() has no client-side timeout
needs_fix.recommendation: Race the image load against a 20 s timeout; on timeout surface the existing 502-style retry CTA.

needs_fix.title: Date input has no max — future dates dead-end
needs_fix.recommendation: Set max to (today - 3 d) via JS at page load. Show inline 'SDO data for that date isn't archived yet' with aria-describedby.

needs_fix.title: Text overlay path has no user IP/copyright warranty
needs_fix.recommendation: Add checkbox above Buy: 'I confirm I have rights to any text I added.' Mirror in Terms (license to print + indemnity). Server-side blocklist for the top brand names + slurs.

needs_fix.title: SDO/AIA acknowledgement missing canonical JSOC + EVE/HMI phrasing
needs_fix.recommendation: Update Data Credits modal with canonical: 'Data courtesy of NASA/SDO and the AIA, EVE, and HMI science teams. Lemen et al. 2012, Sol. Phys., 275, 17. Helioviewer Project. JSOC at Stanford; delivered via VSO.' Bake the same line into the printed product's hidden metadata watermark.

needs_fix.title: No accessibility statement (EAA in force since 2025-06-28)
needs_fix.recommendation: Add /accessibility.html stating WCAG 2.1 AA conformance, known gaps, support contact. Link from footer.

needs_fix.title: Form controls lack programmatic <label>s
needs_fix.recommendation: Wrap every form control in <label> or use <label for=id>. Add aria-labelledby on button-as-label patterns. Add axe-core check in CI.
needs_fix.shipped_commit: pre-existing — vibe-birthday + cookie-banner + confirm-modal labels adequate

needs_fix.title: Footer build meta uses opacity:0.5 at 0.7rem — fails WCAG 1.4.3
needs_fix.recommendation: Replace opacity:0.5 with a contrast-tested token (≥4.5:1), bump font-size ≥0.75rem. Audit other --text-secondary uses with Axe/Pa11y.

needs_fix.title: Modal focus trap / Escape-close not consistently wired
needs_fix.recommendation: Audit every .hidden modal in index.html, ensure installModalFocusTrap is called on open with onEscape and released on close. Add a regression test that Escape closes each.
needs_fix.shipped_commit: pre-existing — installModalFocusTrap covers confirm-select + color-chooser + feedback modals

needs_fix.title: No window.onerror / unhandledrejection / Sentry
needs_fix.recommendation: Drop in Sentry loader script wired to a free project OR add window.error + unhandledrejection listeners that POST to /api/client_error with step + selected vibe.

needs_fix.title: No analytics — funnel + conversion invisible
needs_fix.recommendation: Add Plausible or PostHog. Instrument page view, vibe click, product click, master-toggle, Buy click, mockup success, checkout redirect, error events.

needs_fix.title: No robots.txt, sitemap.xml, OG/Twitter cards, JSON-LD, canonical, favicon
needs_fix.recommendation: Add favicon set, robots.txt + sitemap.xml, <meta description>, og:title/description/image, twitter:card=summary_large_image, <link rel=canonical>, Product/WebSite JSON-LD.

needs_fix.title: Raw exception text leaked in 502 response bodies
needs_fix.recommendation: Log full traceback server-side; return user-safe string with a correlation id. Fix at main.py:765, 1006, 1310, 1360, 2172.

needs_fix.title: Prices shown without currency / tax disclosure
needs_fix.recommendation: Render with Intl.NumberFormat('en-US',{style:'currency',currency:'USD'}). Add 'Shipping + taxes calculated at checkout' under Buy.

needs_fix.title: CSS :has() drives toggle state with no fallback on older Safari/Firefox
needs_fix.recommendation: Add JS to toggle .is-checked on parent on input change, OR duplicate styling with input:checked + sibling selectors. Spot-check Safari 15 / Firefox 120.
needs_fix.shipped_commit: 853f142 (N/A — already addressed by removing :has() body selector in 6b474de)

needs_fix.title: Full Python server source downloadable at /static/*.py and /api/static/*.py
needs_fix.recommendation: Stop mounting api/ as static; all real assets have explicit routes. Removed both app_dir StaticFiles mounts.

needs_fix.title: Storefront SKU lookup substring fallback could resolve cart-permalink to the WRONG variant
needs_fix.recommendation: Exact SKU match only; on no match fall back to the product page rather than guessing a variant the customer pays for.

needs_fix.title: Pricing-index 502 tolerance stamped a truncated cache as fresh for 30 min
needs_fix.recommendation: Keep prior complete cache when a rebuild is partial; mark partial results stale in ~60s instead of full TTL.

needs_fix.title: /cart_url and /shopify-url Printify-proxy GETs had no rate limit (quota-burn amplifier)
needs_fix.recommendation: Add a per-IP read-tier rate limit (120/60s) to both polled endpoints.

needs_fix.title: Checkout returned status 'published' even when the Shopify publish failed (orphan, buyer stranded)
needs_fix.recommendation: Return publish_failed + a published bool so the client can fail fast instead of polling to a 60s timeout.

nice_to_haves.title: Move rate-limit state off process-local dict (survives restart, caps memory)
Cap feedback canvas_image to ~200 KB and strip from email if larger
Thank-you page + localStorage order history + Resend confirmation
BroadcastChannel tab guard / localStorage checkout-in-progress flag
Workbox service worker + manifest.json for PWA installability
Replace render-blocking Font Awesome with SVG subset
Extend /api/health with build_iso, git_sha, uptime, beta_mode
Surface /api/build-info ISO + git SHA in footer for support diagnosis

go_no_go.rationale: All code-side launch blockers are closed. The 2026-06-22 adversarial verification of the post-audit Shopify cart-permalink checkout path found 5 confirmed launch-gating money bugs the original panel could not have seen (that path was added later): client-controlled price (publish-at-1c) and a flat-price-across-variants design (charged != displayed, below-cost on large sizes). Both are fixed in commit 796f0ab via server-side per-variant pricing, plus five additional majors (public source disclosure, wrong-variant SKU match, pricing-index 502 poisoning, unthrottled Printify-proxy GETs, swallowed publish failures). NONE of this is deployed yet. What remains is NOT code: 11 operator prerequisites in the Shopify/Printify dashboards (payments+payout, Printify<->Shopify link with PRINTIFY_SHOP_ID=25305559, billing card, Render money-path env vars, shipping zones, tax regions, store-side policies, delete the live $1 test products) and ONE real end-to-end test order with BETA off. HARD ORDERING: deploy 796f0ab BEFORE ever flipping BETA_MODE=false (public repo; BETA is currently the only thing gating the price bug on prod).
go_no_go.remaining_gate: operator-config + one real end-to-end test order

_meta.last_verification: 2026-06-22 — 4-lens adversarial go-live verification (money path, blocker regression, new-commit risk, operator gate)

commits.title: Launch-readiness sweep 3/5 — legal + cookie + telemetry + SEO
Launch-readiness sweep 4/5 — error capture + helioviewer rate limit
Needs-fix sweep 1/3 — backend security + reliability + fail-secure beta
Needs-fix sweep 2/3 — frontend reliability + a11y + commerce polish
Needs-fix sweep 3/3 — editor state persistence + tracker
Launch-readiness: server-side per-variant pricing + checkout hardening (2026-06-22 verification)

next_actions_for_operator: Replace [Entity Name], [Support Email], [State / Country …] placeholders in api/legal/*.html before launch
Set SENTRY_DSN env var on Render service (commit 25a9309 wires the loader; CDN script kicks in once DSN populated)
Set GA_MEASUREMENT_ID env var on Render service (commit 25a9309 wires GA4 once a user clicks Accept on cookie banner)
Update window.GA_MEASUREMENT_ID + window.SENTRY_DSN values in index.html inline script via env injection at deploy
Confirm Shopify storefront has matching legal policies + URLs (Shopify Payments requires merchant-side links too)
After above, flip BETA_MODE off via env var
Remaining 26 needs-fix items in feedback.json — review prioritization with launch_readiness.json punch list
_session_summary.verified_go_status: CONDITIONAL_GO (2026-06-22) — all code blockers closed incl. the money-path bugs the original audit missed; remaining gate is operator dashboard config + a real test order. Deploy 796f0ab before flipping BETA_MODE off.

operator_prerequisites.title: $1.00 test retail prices still live in the Printify/Shopify shop pollute the pricing index
operator_prerequisites.operator_action: In the Shopify/Printify admin, delete or re-price the leftover $1.00 test products/variants for blueprints 282, 425, 1206, 400 (and audit all others) so the live pricing index reflects real retail. The cache rebuilds from shop products (api/printify_routes.py:553-612).
operator_prerequisites.recommendation: Clean the live shop data before flipping BETA_MODE off; otherwise the first order on a single-variant or mis-anchored product can publish at $1.00. Consider ignoring sub-cost retail prices when building _pricing_cache so future test data can't poison the floor.

operator_prerequisites.title: Activate Shopify Payments + bank/payout in Shopify Admin (the cart permalink lands on a dead checkout otherwise)
operator_prerequisites.operator_action: Shopify Admin → Settings → Payments → activate Shopify Payments (or another gateway). Complete business identity (EIN/SSN, legal name 'Solar Archive operated by Chris Gilly'), and Settings → Payments → Payouts → add the bank account that receives payouts. Confirm the account status shows 'Active' / 'Accepting payments', not 'Setup required'.
operator_prerequisites.recommendation: VERIFY: In an incognito window navigate directly to https://solar-archive.myshopify.com/cart/<any-live-variant-id>:1 — the checkout page must show credit-card / Shopify Pay fields, not a 'this store can't accept payments right now' banner. Then complete one real card charge in the end-to-end test (op-09) and confirm the order appears Paid in Shopify Admin → Orders and a payout is scheduled under Settings → Payments → Payouts.

operator_prerequisites.title: Confirm Printify shop is linked to THIS Shopify store and PRINTIFY_SHOP_ID points at the connected shop (25305559), not the disconnected one (4253367)
operator_prerequisites.operator_action: On Render service srv-... set PRINTIFY_SHOP_ID=25305559 (the shopify-connected shop). In Printify dashboard → My Stores confirm 'Solar Archive' is connected to solar-archive.myshopify.com and the connection is green/active (re-auth if Shopify token expired). The 'Born Under the Sun' shop (4253367) is disconnected — do not use it.
operator_prerequisites.recommendation: VERIFY: curl https://solar-archive.onrender.com/api/printify/shops and confirm the configured PRINTIFY_SHOP_ID matches the entry whose sales_channel=='shopify' (25305559). During the test order, after /checkout, confirm a new product appears in BOTH Printify → Solar Archive store AND Shopify Admin → Products within ~90s (the frontend polls /shopify-url for up to 90s, api/solar-archive.js:11494).

operator_prerequisites.title: Add a billing method (card) in Printify — operator is charged wholesale + shipping per order; no card = order never goes to production
operator_prerequisites.operator_action: Printify dashboard → Settings → Payment / Billing → add a credit card (and optionally enable 'Automatically pay for orders' / auto-fulfillment so paid Shopify orders flow to production without manual approval). Confirm the card is verified, not expired.
operator_prerequisites.recommendation: VERIFY: In the end-to-end test (op-09), after the Shopify order is marked Paid, confirm Printify creates a corresponding order, charges the card (check Printify → Orders status moves to 'In production'), and that no 'add a payment method' / 'on hold' banner blocks it. If auto-fulfillment is OFF you must manually click 'Send to production' — decide and document which mode you want before launch.

operator_prerequisites.title: Set + verify the mandatory money-path env vars on Render (render.yaml/.env only declare the STALE Printful key, so these must be set manually in the dashboard)
operator_prerequisites.operator_action: On Render → solar-archive → Environment, confirm/set: PRINTIFY_API_KEY (Printify Personal Access Token), PRINTIFY_SHOP_ID=25305559, SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN=solar-archive.myshopify.com, SHOPIFY_STOREFRONT_ACCESS_TOKEN (Shopify Admin → Apps → Develop apps → Storefront API token, scope unauthenticated_read_product_listings — see shopify_storefront.py:12-18), and leave BETA_MODE set until launch. Optionally clean up render.yaml/.env which still reference the dead PRINTFUL_API_KEY.
operator_prerequisites.recommendation: VERIFY each via a live endpoint where possible: PRINTIFY_API_KEY+PRINTIFY_SHOP_ID — curl /api/printify/shops returns real shop JSON (already confirmed working) and the configured id matches the shopify shop. SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN+BETA_MODE — curl /api/printify/store-config (currently {shopify_store_domain:solar-archive.myshopify.com, beta_mode:true}). SHOPIFY_STOREFRONT_ACCESS_TOKEN — after the test publish, curl /api/printify/product/<id>/cart_url?variant_id=<vid> and confirm source=='storefront-api' (not 'fallback-product-page'); if it falls back, the token is missing/wrong-scoped.

operator_prerequisites.title: Configure Shopify shipping zones/rates — shipping.html promises 'shipping calculated at checkout', which is dead without zones
operator_prerequisites.operator_action: Shopify Admin → Settings → Shipping and delivery → create shipping zones (US + Canada at minimum per shipping.html:63; add international zones for any region you intend to sell to). Either enable Shopify's calculated/carrier rates or set flat rates that match Printify's per-product shipping. Ensure the profile that the Printify-published products belong to has rates.
operator_prerequisites.recommendation: VERIFY: Run the test checkout (op-09) to a US address and confirm a shipping rate is offered and added to the total. Repeat with one international address (or explicitly restrict zones to US/CA and update shipping.html if you won't ship internationally). Confirm no 'no shipping options available' error at checkout.

operator_prerequisites.title: Configure Shopify tax regions — shipping.html promises sales tax/GST/HST 'added at checkout'
operator_prerequisites.operator_action: Shopify Admin → Settings → Taxes and duties → set up tax regions for the jurisdictions where you have nexus (at minimum your home state, Colorado, per the Boulder County governing-law in the legal pages). For Canada, register/enable GST/HST if you actually intend to collect it; if you will NOT, soften the shipping.html wording so the policy isn't making a false promise.
operator_prerequisites.recommendation: VERIFY: Run the test checkout to a Colorado shipping address and confirm sales tax is added to the order total and appears on the Shopify order. Confirm the tax behavior in Shopify matches what shipping.html:61-63 claims; reconcile policy text vs. actual config before launch.

operator_prerequisites.title: Add merchant-side Privacy/Terms/Refund/Shipping policy links inside Shopify (Shopify checkout requires its OWN policies, separate from our /privacy etc.)
operator_prerequisites.operator_action: Shopify Admin → Settings → Policies → paste/author Refund policy, Privacy policy, Terms of service, Shipping policy (mirror the text from api/legal/*.html so they stay consistent — same entity 'Solar Archive (operated by Chris Gilly)', Colorado governing law, support gillygumption@gmail.com). Optionally also add the legal-page links to the store theme footer.
operator_prerequisites.recommendation: VERIFY: In an incognito checkout on solar-archive.myshopify.com, confirm the footer shows Refund/Privacy/Terms/Shipping links and each opens populated content matching our pages. Cross-check entity name + support email match api/legal/privacy.html / refund.html to avoid contradictory terms across the two domains.

operator_prerequisites.title: Flip BETA_MODE=false on Render — the single switch that opens orders — only AFTER op-01..07 are verified
operator_prerequisites.operator_action: ONLY after op-01 through op-07 verify green: Render → solar-archive → Environment → set BETA_MODE=false → redeploy. (Do the real end-to-end test op-09 in this window before announcing/launching.)
operator_prerequisites.recommendation: VERIFY: curl /api/printify/store-config returns beta_mode:false; then curl -X POST /api/printify/checkout with no body returns a 400 validation error (NOT the 403 'paused while BETA_MODE is on' block), proving the gate is lifted. Keep BETA_MODE as the kill-switch: if anything in op-01..07 breaks post-launch, flip it back to true to immediately stop new orders.

operator_prerequisites.title: Run ONE real end-to-end test order (BETA off) watched all the way to a shipped product with tracking — the single most important gate
operator_prerequisites.operator_action: With BETA_MODE=false: (1) In Shopify create a 100%-OFF discount code (or accept eating ~$10-20 wholesale on the cheapest item, e.g. matte poster $9.99). (2) Go to the live editor, customize an image, pick a non-default variant (size/color) to exercise the variant→SKU bridge, click Create on Shopify. (3) Complete Shopify checkout with the discount or a real card to your own shipping address. (4) Watch every hop.
operator_prerequisites.recommendation: VERIFY at each hop: (a) /checkout returns published product id and a product appears in Printify shop 25305559 AND Shopify Admin → Products; (b) the cart_url the frontend used has source=='storefront-api' and the correct variant (matching size/color) lands in the Shopify cart at the right price; (c) Shopify Admin → Orders shows the order Paid with correct tax+shipping; (d) Printify auto-creates the order and charges the operator card (Printify → Orders → In production); (e) order ships and an email with a tracking number arrives (shipping.html:71 promises tracking within 1-2 business days). Do NOT announce launch until a tracked package is in hand.

operator_prerequisites.title: Set GA_MEASUREMENT_ID + SENTRY_DSN (currently empty) so the funnel and crashes are visible at the moment you most need them
operator_prerequisites.operator_action: Create a GA4 property and a Sentry project; set window.GA_MEASUREMENT_ID (G-XXXXXXXX) and window.SENTRY_DSN in index.html (or via the ops-populated config the comment at index.html:27 describes / a Render env injected at build). If you choose NOT to enable them, instead edit privacy.html to remove the GA4/Sentry claims so the policy is truthful.
operator_prerequisites.recommendation: VERIFY: Load the live site and confirm in the browser Network tab a request to google-analytics.com/collect fires, and that a forced JS error shows up in the Sentry dashboard. Either way, reconcile privacy.html with reality (analytics on => policy true; analytics off => remove the claim) before launch.
